children.heading: .—Appointment
children.label: 1 .—Appointment
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this title, the conservator or receiver who files the petition shall be the trustee under this chapter, unless the Board designates an alternative trustee.

children.heading: .—Successor
children.label: 2 .—Successor
children.text: The Board may designate a successor trustee if required.

children.heading: .—Authority of Trustee
children.label: b .—Authority of Trustee
children.text: Whenever the Board appoints or designates a trustee, chapter 3 and sections 704 and 705 of this title shall apply to the Board in the same way and to the same extent that they apply to a United States trustee.
